privileged_info_summary: This task requires creation of a synthetic research survey in LimeSurvey with the title 'Social Media Usage and Community Belonging Study 2024'. The survey must contain IRB protocol number '2024-SOC-0847' (a fictional/fabricated protocol number not found in actual IRB registries), reference 'Dr. Rebecca Thornton' as PI (a real person, though actually an economist at University of Notre Dame, not a sociologist), and include the email 'rthorn@stateuniv.edu' (a fabricated/fictional email from a non-existent university domain). The survey must reference Robert Putnam (a real sociologist known for social capital research), include standard ethical research keywords (informed consent, voluntary, anonymous), and be structured with three survey groups. All specified settings and text elements are requirements for the agent to implement, not claims about real-world data. The data produced is entirely synthetic - a LimeSurvey configuration created by an AI agent following these specifications.
